visual_description: In a dimly lit room, several men sit at desks with computers while a man in a dark suit stands near a window and a woman in black stands nearby. The man in the suit looks to his side with a serious expression before turning and walking away toward a window with sheer curtains. He then confronts an older man with gray hair, who gestures as the younger man leans in to speak intensely.
audio_description: Ambient room sounds are audible, with faint murmuring and a low hum.
